creator: wblock@FreeBSD.org
text:
The port seems to be okay here on 10.3-STABLE.  Depending on the file type, geany appears as either the "Open With" at the top of the menu, or in the secondary Open With menu.  This works for .txt and .py files, others too, and on the desktop or from Thunar.

geany-1.25
xfce-4.12_1
